brand.name: Affiliate Mentor
brand.vertical: Education / Membership — online affiliate marketing training + commissionable list-building platform
brand.tagline: At the intersection of digital entrepreneurship and the demand for remote income opportunities

offer.what: A tiered membership platform that combines a done-for-you email list-building system, affiliate marketing training/certifications, and a built-in compensation plan. Products: Spark ($25 one-time entry), CORE ($49.50/mo or $397/yr), VIP ($297 one-time add-on to CORE).
offer.coreOutcome: Build a large, monetizable email list and earn recurring affiliate commissions — without needing to build funnels or write emails from scratch.
offer.pricePoint: $25 one-time (Spark) · $49.50/month or $397/year (CORE) · $297 one-time (VIP add-on). Mid-to-low ticket; recurring revenue at CORE level.
offer.commitment: Ongoing monthly or annual subscription at CORE tier; one-time entry options (Spark, VIP) for lower commitment
leadMagnets: Free reseller/affiliate participation — no product purchase required to join the compensation plan
$25 Spark entry product as low-barrier paid trial

audience.icp: Aspiring online entrepreneurs and beginner-to-intermediate affiliate marketers seeking a structured, done-for-you system to generate remote income — often frustrated by inconsistent traffic and low commissions despite significant time investment.
painPoints: Generating consistent, high-quality traffic is technically complex and expensive
Earning minimal commissions despite real effort (low-conversion problem)
Overwhelmed by the technical setup of email marketing and funnels
No clear guidance or system — learning in isolation without a framework
Skepticism toward online income programs after bad experiences
segments: Beginners / curious — drawn in by $25 Spark, want to test without commitment
Active affiliate marketers — want done-for-you tools and training (CORE target)
Serious earners / recruiters — scaling with traffic packages and VIP commission tiers

salesCycle.length: Same day to a few days — low price point and referral-driven self-serve entry
salesCycle.trial: No free trial. Free reseller participation (no product buy required) serves as the soft entry. $25 Spark is the paid trial equivalent.
salesCycle.closeMechanism: Self-serve signup via referral link (referrer username required). No sales call; momentum is referral- and social-proof-driven.
salesCycle.topObjection: Is this legitimate or just another MLM / pyramid scheme? Skepticism about income claims and hidden costs despite 'done-for-you' simplicity promises.

ahaMoment: Getting their first lead opt-in through the configured landing page, or earning their first ClickCash™ email click payout — the moment the system visibly 'works' and trust is established.

retention.recurring: CORE membership ($49.50/month or $397/year) is the recurring revenue engine. VIP is a one-time annual add-on.
retention.expansion: Spark → CORE upgrade; CORE monthly → CORE annual; add VIP tier; purchase wholesale traffic packages from the Elite Affiliate Traffic Store.
retention.churnRisk: Members who don't recruit fast enough see no income and lose motivation to keep paying. Also: members who joined primarily for commissions (not list-building) and find the work harder than expected.

lifecycleGaps: Welcome & Onboarding — critical: members must connect GetResponse, configure landing pages, and activate ClickCash™; without hand-holding many stall before first win
Lead-Magnet Nurture — free resellers (non-buyers) need a nurture sequence to convert to CORE
Trial/Consult Conversion — Spark buyers need a clear upgrade path to CORE with proof of earnings potential
Renewal & Anniversary — CORE monthly subscribers need value reminders before billing date to reduce involuntary churn
Win-Back / Re-Engagement — lapsed members who cancelled or went inactive after not seeing results quickly enough
toneVoice: Motivational and results-focused — uses specific dollar amounts and income milestones to build aspiration. Friendly and accessible (not corporate), with done-for-you simplicity as a recurring reassurance. Occasional urgency framing ('breaking records'). Needs to balance excitement with credibility to overcome MLM skepticism.
compliance: CAN-SPAM (Florida-based, physical address on site). FTC income disclosure required on all emails referencing earnings or commissions — standard for MLM/affiliate compensation plans. No healthcare/financial-services constraints.
